chief_complaint: A 50-year-old woman presents with focal seizures.
history: The patient has a history of chronic renal disease and hypothyroidism. She was started on levofloxacin as part of her multidrug-resistant tuberculosis treatment regimen. The seizures exhibited unilateral aberrant movements with initially intact consciousness, thereafter followed by brief episodes of altered awareness.
exam: Vital signs: not provided. Physical examination: not provided.
labs: Thorough investigations ruled out metabolic, structural and other pharmacological reasons.
